summary: Rozier (not an All-Star) on leave; Billups (5x All-Star but now coach, excluded by fine print). No All-Star player suspended for betting in 2025.
content:
Key findings for meta-question about CP on underlying question 31106:

1. Terry Rozier - arrested Oct 23, 2025 by FBI for gambling. Placed on leave by NBA. NOT an All-Star. Does not count for underlying question resolution.

2. Chauncey Billups - 5x NBA All-Star, but currently a coach (Portland Trail Blazers). Fine print explicitly excludes coaches/managers. Does not count.

3. No NFL Pro Bowl, MLB All-Star, or NHL All-Star players have been suspended or banned for sports betting in 2025.

4. The underlying question CP was 10.00% as of Dec 6, 2025. The meta-question asks if CP will be above 10.00% on Dec 21.

5. The underlying question has 201 forecasters - relatively stable base.

6. With only ~3 weeks left for the underlying question (Jan 1, 2026 deadline), and no All-Star involved in current scandals, CP should trend flat or downward.
